problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
mechanism: Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration
hypothesis: If Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration is applied to to, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
